name: i2v-worker-monorepo
description: Story -> Image -> Video (i2v) production platform: web console, API, and background worker

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/db && npm run build --workspace=packages/api && npm run build --workspace=packages/worker && npm run build --workspace=packages/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/shared && npm run lint --workspace=packages/db && npm run lint --workspace=packages/api && npm run lint --workspace=packages/worker && npm run lint --workspace=packages/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/shared && npm run test --workspace=packages/db && npm run test --workspace=packages/api && npm run test --workspace=packages/worker
